TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chuck_Aleksinas, title = Chuck_Aleksinas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chuck_Aleksinas} }

S.FORM: Chuck Aleksinas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1959, byacing te 2 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Litchfield, Connecticut, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 118 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1982 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Chuck Aleksinas sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1959, byacing te 2 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Litchfield, Connecticut, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 118 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1982 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ƒßu ¶~ ®k aleks~…ïinas~…ï s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï te ****, Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã te * ru ** rjax qu ƒßint…£an nja, kinƒßulan nja …£a lit ¶~ ®ƒß*iel*, ¶~ ®onne ¶~ ®ti ¶~ ®ut, ƒßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ïquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunŒ≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin îs~…ïuw nja, ƒßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ïpzja≈ã Œ≤laq na ppzuj mari nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ïqu te qutux laƒßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ïquliq, …£alun nqu ¶~ ®ƒßi ¶~ ®a…£o Œ≤ulls~…ï. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
